333-wardrobe-method.html.metaDesc: Master the 333 Wardrobe Method (Project 333). Learn how to choose your 33 items, create outfits, and simplify your life with our complete 2026 guide.
333-wardrobe-method.html.title: 333 Wardrobe Method Guide: Style 33 Items for 3 Months | FitWardrobe

index_og.ogTitle: FitWardrobe | AI Outfit Planner & Capsule Wardrobe App
index_og.ogDesc: FitWardrobe helps you fit your wardrobe to your lifestyle with AI. Plan outfits, build capsule wardrobes, and organize clothes with privacy-first technology.
index_og.twitterTitle: FitWardrobe | AI Outfit Planner & Capsule Wardrobe App
index_og.twitterDesc: FitWardrobe helps you fit your wardrobe to your lifestyle with AI. Plan outfits, build capsule wardrobes, and organize clothes with privacy-first technology.

schemas.name: FitWardrobe
schemas.description: Privacy-first AI wardrobe organizer and outfit planner. FitWardrobe stores your clothing photos on your device and uses AI to suggest outfits, build capsule wardrobes, and track cost per wear.
schemas.keywords: wardrobe app, outfit planner, capsule wardrobe, AI wardrobe, privacy wardrobe app, wardrobe organizer, fit wardrobe, clothing organization, minimalist wardrobe, outfit planner app

acceptedAnswer.text: Beta means the app is in the final stages of testing. Most features work perfectly, but you might occasionally encounter minor bugs.
Yes. FitWardrobe is built with a local-first philosophy. Your clothing photos and personal style data remain encrypted on your device and never leave your control.

mainEntity.name: When will the iOS version be available?

acceptedAnswer.text: The iOS TestFlight beta is expected in March 2026. Join the Telegram channel to be first to know.

mainEntity.name: Will the app remain free after beta?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Core privacy-first styling features will always be free. Beta testers receive early adopter status with free access to any future premium features.
